message:
feat(session): Add N1DetectionScope RAII guard and DECIMAL precision/scale support

N+1 detection improvements (n1_detection.rs):
- Add N1DetectionScope RAII guard that captures initial stats and logs summary on drop
- Add from_tracker() constructor for convenience
- Add verbose() option to log even when no issues found
- Scope automatically tracks queries within its lifetime for easier N+1 diagnosis

Field metadata enhancements (field.rs):
- Add precision and scale fields to FieldInfo for DECIMAL/NUMERIC types
- Add precision() and scale() builder methods with const fn support
- Add precision_opt() and scale_opt() for optional values
- Enables proper DDL generation for fixed-point decimal columns

Related session adjustments:
- Minor updates to change_tracker.rs, lib.rs, flush.rs for consistency

Example usage:
  {
      let _scope = N1DetectionScope::from_tracker(session.n1_tracker());
      for hero in &mut heroes {
          hero.team.load(&mut session).await?;
      }
  } // logs N+1 summary if threshold exceeded

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
